---
name: "Release"
about: "Track the tasks required to complete and publish a new release."
assignees: "svprdga"
---

## Release task list

- [ ] Test version
- [ ] Close CommonLib version if required
- [ ] Prepare version
- [ ] Internal test if required
- [ ] Deploy in Google's Google Play
- [ ] Deploy in Apple's App Store
- [ ] Deploy in Samsung's Galaxy Store
- [ ] Deploy in Huawei's App Gallery
- [ ] Deploy in private cloud
- [ ] Upload debug symbols
- [ ] Clean resources
